query:
SELECT
                producer_name,
                message_id AS "message_id!",
                tx_id::text::bigint AS "tx_id!: i64"
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    producer_name,
                    message_id,
                    tx_id,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                        PARTITION BY producer_name
                        ORDER BY tx_id DESC, message_id DESC
                    ) AS rn
                FROM outbox_messages
            ) ranked
            WHERE rn = 1
